title: ED vs Mamata Banerjee: Supreme Court says Chief Minister cannot put democracy in peril by interfering with probe
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday criticised West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee for alleged interference in search operations conducted earlier this year by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) against political consultancy firm I-PAC in Kolkata.A Bench of Justices PK Mishra and NV Anjaria said that a Chief Minister cannot harm democracy by such actions."This is not a dispute between the State and the Union. A Chief Minister of any State cannot walk in the midst of an investigation, put the dem
